leadText: Cotton Guard (Japanese: コットンガード Cotton Guard) is a non-damaging Grass-type move introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Cotton Guard raises the user's Defense stat by three stages. Cotton Guard can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , causing Baton Pass and Stored Power to give the user an extra three appeal points if they are used in the next turn. If powered up by a Grassium Z into Z-Cotton Guard, all of the user's lowered stats are reset. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically raising the user's Defense stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, which drastically raises the user's Defense stat. S V The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically boosting its Defense stat. ZA The user boosts its Defense stat for a long while by wrapping its body in soft cotton.

(The stat change returns to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.) S MD It significantly boosts your Defense.
